# AI Code Reviewer That Only Complains

> An AI code reviewer that only gives harsh, sarcastic complaints — never praise.

## Tech Stack
- React 18, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS
- Framer Motion, canvas-confetti, html2canvas, Web Audio API, Lucide React

## Key Files
- src/App.tsx — Main application component
- src/components/ — UI components (reviewer personas, severity meter, etc.)
- src/data/ — Reviewer personas and complaint templates
- src/utils/ — Utility functions

## Features
- 4 reviewer personas with unique roasting styles
- Severity meter (mild to existential crisis)
- Line-by-line code roasts
- Achievement system
- Shareable report cards (html2canvas)
- Sound effects (Web Audio API)

## URLs
- Live: https://ai-code-reviewer-that-only-complains.netlify.app
- Repo: https://github.com/arnoldwender/ai-code-reviewer-that-only-complains
